desmos3d.png.description: a screenshot of a 3d scatter plot in Desmos

navlab.png.description: ALVINN / the Navlab, a retrofitted self-driving army ambulance

plane-of-best-fit.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team in Acorn

projection.webp.description: A 3d rendering of a short cylinder casting shadows on two perpendicular surfaces. One shadow is a circle, and the other is a square.
projection.webp.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data

forecast.png.description: a one-week weather forecast predicting a variety of different weather conditions

self-driving-car.jpg.description: A photo of a self-driving car with a sensor perched on top, parked in the middle of an empty road.

steering-v-curve-lr.png.description: A scatter plot of Steering-Angle v. Curve, showing a positive linear relationship. The line of best fit is graphed on top of the scatter plot.
steering-v-curve-lr.png.source: Created by the Bootstrap Team using Pyret based on contrived data
